CustomField.description: This a Formula field that calculates Term in full months from Start to End Date. 15+ days are being considered as a 1 Month.
CustomField.formula:
(((YEAR(End_Date_INF__c) - YEAR(Start_Date_INF__c ) - 1) *12) + (12 - MONTH(Start_Date_INF__c ) +1) + MONTH(End_Date_INF__c)- 1+
IF((DAY(End_Date_INF__c) - DAY(Start_Date_INF__c )>15),1,
IF((DAY(End_Date_INF__c) - DAY(Start_Date_INF__c )<(-15)),-1,
0)))
CustomField.label: Term (in Months)
